name: Automated CSM Handoff Agent
description: Manages the AE-to-CSM handoff process with automated data collection, stakeholder mapping, and kickoff scheduling.
longDescription: Triggers when a deal closes in your CRM and automates the entire AE-to-CSM handoff process. Pulls deal context, stakeholder information, and key requirements from the opportunity record. Creates a structured handoff document, schedules a kickoff meeting via Google Calendar, and sends the CSM a comprehensive account briefing via Slack and email — ensuring no context is lost in the transition.
